case_title: JAY MORTON et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTIONS HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORTON, JAY PHILLIPS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTIONS DOES 1 THRU 50, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-04-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-20-2010
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION W1210105F018 FOR CIVIL COMPLAINT/PETITION/OTHER FIRST PAPER
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W1210105F018 FOR CIVIL COMPLAINT/PETITION/OTHER FIRST PAPER

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
